purpose: Compact machine-facing map of docs thematic districts.
generated_rule: Reflects docs/thematic_districts.json; does not author meaning.

agent-lane.role: Agent-lane references that support AGENTS.md without becoming root doctrine.

audits.role: Audit evidence, cleanup candidates, review protocols, and drift checks.

landings.role: Historical seed manifests, wave receipts, and landing notes.

registry.role: Registry evolution, schema/capsule notes, and generated-index planning.

decisions.role: Decision records explaining why a route, owner split, or placement was chosen.

postmortems.role: Failure-learning, incident review, repair notes, and retrospectives.

traces.role: Migration evidence, provenance logs, link rewrite traces, and move manifests.

agon.role: Historical or transitional Agon center records not owned by current mechanics/agon surfaces.

experience.role: Historical or transitional Experience center records not owned by current mechanics/experience surfaces.

legacy.role: Compatibility aliases and superseded flat docs preserved for provenance.
